basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi has released the official notification for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech. / B.E. / M.Sc./M.tech or equivalent in Computer Science and Engineering or Mathematics with 60% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA or equivalent marks AND Qualified in at least one of the following: CSIR-UGC NET (JRF/LS) / GATE / DBT
qualification.details: B. Tech. / B.E. / M.Sc./M.tech (or equivalent) in Computer Science and Engineering or Mathematics with 60% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA or equivalent marks Qualified in at least one of the following: CSIR-UGC NET (JRF/LS) / GATE / DBT

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000 per month plus HRA as applicable
salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000 per month plus HRA as applicable

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Mandi JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a B. Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.tech (or equivalent) in Computer Science and Engineering or Mathematics with at least 60% marks or 6.0 CGPA. Additionally, they must have qualified in CSIR-UGC NET (JRF/LS), GATE, or DBT.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send a filled CV with all necessary details to the PI Dr. Mirza Galib Anwarul Husain Baig at [email protected].

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is IITM/SRIC/Project No IITM/ANRF/MGH/606.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a temporary position.

faq.question: Q8. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi).

faq.question: Q9. What are the key documents to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: You should attach your CV, educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIT Mandi located?
faq.answer: IIT Mandi is located in Mandi, Himachal Pradesh, with the pincode 175075.
